description_long: This object is a long, double-edged sword with a straight blade and a prominent crossguard. The blade is slender and tapers gradually to a point, suggesting it is designed for both thrusting and cutting. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing hand protection and balance. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of the same material as the blade, ending in a rounded pommel for counterweight and grip security. The entire object has a uniform, dark metallic finish, with no visible ornamentation or color variation. The sword's design is utilitarian, with clean lines and no decorative features, making it suitable for practical use rather than ceremonial display.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a simple crossguard and a rounded pommel, all in a dark metallic finish. The design is utilitarian and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and cylindrical handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the sword's slenderness.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and straightness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical handle, dark metallic, rounded pommel, no visible grip texture
